pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent from 1.5.1 to 3.3.5 to support Java 21 and modern Spring features.
Configure Maven compiler properties to target Java 21 source and target levels.
Add explicit maven-compiler-plugin configuration with Java 21 source/target and module opening arguments.
Add JVM arguments to open java.base modules for reflection access required by legacy libraries on Java 21.
Configure maven-surefire-plugin to pass module opening arguments to the test runtime.
Configure spring-boot-maven-plugin to pass module opening arguments to the application runtime.
Replace default Tomcat starter with Undertow starter for the web server.
Explicitly exclude Tomcat starter from the web dependency to prevent conflicts.
Add Thymeleaf starter dependency for template rendering.
Upgrade UnboundID LDAP SDK from 3.2.0 to 7.0.3.
Add explicit dependency on Undertow core library.
Upgrade owner-java8 to owner 1.0.12.
Add NetBeans JSON simple library dependency.
Upgrade org.json library to 20240303.
Upgrade Apache HttpClient from 4.2.2 to 4.5.14.
Upgrade Guava from 13.0.1 to 33.3.1-jre and remove test scope.
Upgrade Apache Commons Lang3 from 3.5 to 3.17.0.
Upgrade Google Authenticator library from 1.1.1 to 1.5.0.
Add Jakarta Validation API dependency.
Add Hibernate Validator dependency.
Add Bouncy Castle provider and PKIX dependencies.
Add OpenSAML, XMLTooling, and OpenWS dependencies for SAML support.
Remove MarkLogic Java Client API dependency.
Comment out Spring Security starter dependency.
Comment out Spring JDBC dependency.
Rename artifact ID from mleaproxy to mlesproxy.
Update project version from 0.0.1-SNAPSHOT to 2.0.0.
Update project name and description to reflect new identity.
Explicitly define Maven Central repository.
Define start-class property for Spring Boot main class.
Upgrade maven-surefire-plugin to 3.2.5.

README.md.general_idea: Changed file permissions from 644 to 755 to make the README executable.
Replaced minimal README content with comprehensive documentation including installation, configuration, and usage examples.
README.md.human_impl: Added ~630 lines of Markdown documentation covering installation, configuration parameters, and sample configurations.

README.md.general_idea: Document the various load balancing algorithms supported by the proxy server.
README.md.human_impl: Added list of algorithms: single, failover, roundrobin, roundrobindns, fewest, fastest.

README.md.general_idea: Provide a complex configuration example demonstrating failover between multiple server sets.
README.md.human_impl: Added properties block for listener.proxy.ldapset=set1,set2 and corresponding server definitions.

README.md.general_idea: Include sample log output to illustrate the startup and configuration loading process.
README.md.human_impl: Added debug log lines showing server set building and listener startup.

src/main/resources/application.propertie.general_idea: Changed the root logging level from DEBUG to INFO to reduce verbosity in production environments.
Configured the application to write logs to a specific file named mleaproxy.log.
Set a specific format for log entries written to the file, including date, level, class, thread, and message.
Set a specific format for log entries printed to the console, including timestamp, thread, level, logger, and message.

src/main/resources/mleaproxy.properties.general_idea: Restructure the properties file to align with a new modular architecture separating SAML, LDAP listeners, and request processors.
src/main/resources/mleaproxy.properties.human_impl: Renamed keys from 'listener.*' to 'samllistener.*' and 'ldaplistener.*', and introduced 'requestProcessor.*' and 'ds.*' sections.

src/main/resources/mleaproxy.properties.general_idea: Remove configuration for Duo and Google authenticators that are no longer supported or have been refactored out of this version.
Reduce the number of defined LDAP server sets to a minimal configuration for the new architecture.
src/main/resources/mleaproxy.properties.human_impl: Removed definitions for set2 through set6, keeping only set1.

src/main/resources/mleaproxy.properties.general_idea: Update the remaining LDAP server definition to point to the correct host and port for the new setup.
src/main/resources/mleaproxy.properties.human_impl: Changed server1 host to 192.168.0.60 and port to 636.

src/main/resources/mleaproxy.properties.general_idea: Introduce configuration options for SAML authentication listeners and debugging.
